title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Category Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
